name: Fresh Fruit Ice Cream
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Pureed or mashed fresh fruit (peaches, strawberries, Bananas, raspberries, etc.)
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients in an ice cream freezer container and mix well.
2. Freeze according to manufacturer's instructions.
Refrigerator Freezer Method:
1. Omit half-and-half.
2. In a large bowl, combine sweetened condensed milk and vanilla; stir in pureed fruit and food coloring, if desired.
3. Fold in 2 cups whipping cream (do NOT use non-dairy topping).
4. Pour into a 9x5 loaf pan or other 2-quart container.
5. Cover and freeze for 6 hours or until firm.
